biography: Dyessa Garcia is a Filipino actress and singer-songwriter who rose to prominence through her work with the streaming platform Vivamax. She began her career in the entertainment industry by participating in various amateur singing contests before transitioning into acting in 2023. Known for her roles in adult-oriented dramas (the "sexy-drama" genre), she has starred in numerous films, including Init (2024), Donselya (2024), and Dilig (2024).  In addition to her film career, she is a recording artist under Vicor Music. Her music style is described as slow pop/rock, and she made her debut with the ballad "Tanggap Ko Na" in 2024.
name: Dyessa Garcia
